assessment.note: Names a concrete blocker to mentoring — unclear involvement in the billing rewrite and lack of direct communication — which signals stalled growth support.

new_queue.label: Billing rewrite weird
new_queue.name: On the billing rewrite — what's weird about how it's being handled from your seat?
new_queue.description: Drills into the billing rewrite thread to surface the specific clarity or stakeholder gap behind the concern.

new_queue.label: Mentoring trade-off
new_queue.name: What would you need to drop to make space for mentoring?
new_queue.description: Surfaces the real cost of taking mentoring back up and whether the trade-off feels workable.

new_queue.label: Next-step close
new_queue.name: What's the first concrete thing you want to have moved by our next conversation?
new_queue.description: Closes by turning the check-in into a specific next action or outcome.
